title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
summary: OpenAI宣布在佐治亚州埃芬汉县启动Project Camellia项目，承诺负责任能源、社区投资、就业机会及Codex访问权限。
highlights: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia
commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex
